raw_text: skills matlab simulink python languages spanish english french swedish profile at the moment, am working at airbus in the avionic systems concepts de- partment, after completing an internship in the a350 chief engineer's office. the tasks were related to occurrences and in-service investigations by using data an- alytics in skywise. in 2021 did an erasmus in sweden and worked with linkóping university and sarc (swedish aerospace research center) about the implementation of high pressure hydrogen tanks in aircraft. in 2023 did research about airfoils at low number of reynolds and my final project was about free and forced convection simulations in mars and earth atmosphere, which received the highest distinction. education universidad camilo josé cela-fue master in aerospace engineering universidad politécnica de madrid master in organizational management in digital area] environments and data analytics aircraft intensification, learned about preliminary rpas desing and legislation, wind tur- bines, flight dynamics, navigation among other subjects degree in aerospace engineering 2017-2021. universidad politécnica de madrid aircraft intensification, knowledge of aircraft design, legislation, aerodynamics, aeroe- lasticity work experience avionic system concepts airbus a350 chief eng. office trainee (discover intern- ship) airbus universidad politécnica de madrid/inta the following articles have been published as a result of an internship about low reynolds numbers: exploring the effectiveness of visualization techniques for naca symmetric airfoils at extremely low reynolds numbers, automation of winglet wings geometry generation for lts application in tornado and numerical analysis of the thermal convection through a flat plate in martian conditions. assistant catiav5 profesor universidad politécnica de madrid assistant collaborator in data process bigm civil engineers was working on the design of uav missions and processing of the calculated data. additional information soft skills: critical thinking, teamwork, empathy, problem solving. job-related skills: am adequate to process information and select the most important parts. language certificates: english (b2 level-cambridge first certificate), french (b1-delf). certificates: python training in machine learning (worksmart), open and specific drone pilot (aesa), leadership skills (centro de liderazgo y y tecnología upm). other skills: have a driver license b and participated at the mentoring program from my university to help new students. appreciate to learn new things so had attended to different talks at the university (for example, tanker aircraft and fcas, both from airbus). realized a course about geomatic data processing with rpas (30h) and a python course in udemy. was a volunteer for single-parent families to give school reinforcement and have black belt in judo. also, participated in the vii edition of airbus meet program. future expectations: hope to expand my knowledge, find new challenges and achieve important goals.
